title: Floral Crispy Turkish Lamb Kebabs
description: A Turkish-inspired dish featuring crispy lamb kebabs with a floral twist, made with Dutch stroop and bhuna spices, perfect for a meal-prep dinner. This egg-free-friendly recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Dutch stroop, bhuna spice mix, rose petals, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and mix until they are evenly coated with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked through and crispy on the outside.
While the lamb is cooking, prepare a side of roasted vegetables or a salad to serve with the kebabs.
Once the lamb is done, remove it from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh rose petals and a side of your choice.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
